texto: The creation of conditions by which an entire people who have lived in exploitation and illiteracy gains access to the highest levels of knowledge and creativity is one of the most beautiful achievements of a revolution.
explicacao: Citação de Roberto Fernández Retamar sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “The creation of conditions by which an entire people who have lived in exploitation and illiterac…” articula reflexao, revolution, creation em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
